items.title: S01E01 - Romeo & Juliet
items.summary: When Miss Titley puts on a production of Romeo And Juliet, young Gordon is first to volunteer for the part of the male lead.

infolabels.title: Romeo & Juliet
infolabels.plot: When Miss Titley puts on a production of Romeo And Juliet, young Gordon is first to volunteer for the part of the male lead.

items.title: S01E02 - The Road Not Taken
items.summary: Geraldine invites a former pupil to give a careers talk, which makes Doug insanely jealous, while Baz thinks it's about time Gordon stopped filling his head with dreams of university and got a proper job.

infolabels.title: The Road Not Taken
infolabels.plot: Geraldine invites a former pupil to give a careers talk, which makes Doug insanely jealous, while Baz thinks it's about time Gordon stopped filling his head with dreams of university and got a proper job.

items.title: S01E03 - The Golden Whistle
items.summary: Doug puffs his chest out for the highlight of PE teachers' year, The Golden Whistle Awards. He is a bit too grand to take Geraldine and instead takes the Amazonian PE mistress, Miss Thing.

infolabels.title: The Golden Whistle
infolabels.plot: Doug puffs his chest out for the highlight of PE teachers' year, The Golden Whistle Awards. He is a bit too grand to take Geraldine and instead takes the Amazonian PE mistress, Miss Thing.

items.title: S01E04 - Something For The Weekend
items.summary: Gordon tries every trick in the book to stop leering love rival Doug Digby from whisking winsome Geraldine off for a dirty weekend.

infolabels.title: Something For The Weekend
infolabels.plot: Gordon tries every trick in the book to stop leering love rival Doug Digby from whisking winsome Geraldine off for a dirty weekend.

items.title: S01E05 - Fung Fu Fighting
items.summary: Doug Digby may think he's a hard man, but he's a softie compared with his dad. Digby senior drops in on his son, spit-roasts his pet piglet for bacon sarnies and leaves Doug a quivering mess.

infolabels.title: Fung Fu Fighting
infolabels.plot: Doug Digby may think he's a hard man, but he's a softie compared with his dad. Digby senior drops in on his son, spit-roasts his pet piglet for bacon sarnies and leaves Doug a quivering mess.

items.title: S01E06 - Survival Of The Fittest
items.summary: Lovelorn Gordon tries to convince Miss Titley that Digby is nothing but a brute, but she will have none of it until the grudge match against a team led by his arch-rival Ron Atkinson.

infolabels.title: Survival Of The Fittest
infolabels.plot: Lovelorn Gordon tries to convince Miss Titley that Digby is nothing but a brute, but she will have none of it until the grudge match against a team led by his arch-rival Ron Atkinson.

items.title: S02E01 - The Beautiful Game
items.summary: Digby aims to fill the school's trophy cabinet - with the first coming in a cricket match against a posh school.

infolabels.title: The Beautiful Game
infolabels.plot: Digby aims to fill the school's trophy cabinet - with the first coming in a cricket match against a posh school.

items.title: S02E02 - The Gold Star
items.summary: Digby runs for his life.

items.title: S02E03 - The Beast With Two Backs
items.summary: Geraldine decides it's time for some sex education for her students.

infolabels.title: The Beast With Two Backs

items.title: S02E04 - One Day In The Life
items.summary: Doug takes up English teaching.

infolabels.title: One Day In The Life
infolabels.plot: Doug takes up English teaching.

items.title: S02E05 - The Search For Extraterrestial Intelligence
items.summary: Gordon plans a romantic evening with Geraldine under the stars - at Jodrell Bank.

infolabels.title: The Search For Extraterrestial Intelligence
infolabels.plot: Gordon plans a romantic evening with Geraldine under the stars - at Jodrell Bank.

items.title: S02E06 - Driving Miss Titley
items.summary: Digby finds his dream home.

items.title: S02E07 - The Bionic Boy
items.summary: Gordon is jealous as Darren is hailed as a genius.

items.title: S02E08 - The Pon Parr
items.summary: Gordon finally gets a girlfriend.

items.title: S02E09 - The Memory Gland
items.summary: Gordon moves in with the Titleys.

infolabels.plot: Gordon moves in with the Titleys.

items.title: S02E10 - The Prime of Mr Doug Digby
items.summary: Gordon has a chance to fulfil his dream of wooing Geraldine at the Christmas skating gala.

infolabels.title: The Prime of Mr Doug Digby
infolabels.plot: Gordon has a chance to fulfil his dream of wooing Geraldine at the Christmas skating gala.

items.title: S03E01 - The Big Sleep
items.summary: It's now 1978 and Britain is experiencing the punk revolution. Poor Miss Titley has been in a coma since her accident in 1975. Lovestruck Gordon, who is now a trainee English teacher, has visited her everyday to hold her hand and read her his poems.

infolabels.title: The Big Sleep
infolabels.plot: It's now 1978 and Britain is experiencing the punk revolution. Poor Miss Titley has been in a coma since her accident in 1975. Lovestruck Gordon, who is now a trainee English teacher, has visited her everyday to hold her hand and read her his poems.

items.title: S03E02 - Death And The Maiden
items.summary: Gordon takes an instant dislike to the new woodwork teacher.

infolabels.title: Death And The Maiden
infolabels.plot: Gordon takes an instant dislike to the new woodwork teacher.

items.title: S03E03 - Ecce Homo
items.summary: Mr Holder is concerned that Miss Titley's new look will cause too much disturbance among the male pupils. Gordon enjoys camping it up on stage in the school's production of Where Eagles Dare: The Musical, until his masculinity is questioned. Geraldine is smitten with new teacher Dave.

infolabels.title: Ecce Homo
infolabels.plot: Mr Holder is concerned that Miss Titley's new look will cause too much disturbance among the male pupils. Gordon enjoys camping it up on stage in the school's production of Where Eagles Dare: The Musical, until his masculinity is questioned. Geraldine is smitten with new teacher Dave.

items.title: S03E04 - An Inspector Calls
items.summary: Mr Holder is terrified when he finds out that formidable inspector Mrs Robbins is due to visit his school. Gordon discovers that she's also a scary seductress when she offers him some hands-on tuition back in her hotel room.

infolabels.title: An Inspector Calls
infolabels.plot: Mr Holder is terrified when he finds out that formidable inspector Mrs Robbins is due to visit his school. Gordon discovers that she's also a scary seductress when she offers him some hands-on tuition back in her hotel room.

items.title: S03E05 - Forbidden Fruit
items.summary: Dave Trebilcock decides to cool things down with Miss Titley when their relationship becomes the talk of the school. In order to rekindle his interest, Miss Titley makes him an offer no man could refuse, and it's all in the name of art. Darren, the school's resident punk, is caught selling nude photos in the tuck shop.

infolabels.title: Forbidden Fruit

Darren, the school's resident punk, is caught selling nude photos in the tuck shop.

items.title: S03E06 - The Grimley Curse
items.summary: Gordon becomes a punk guru.
